description: Realistic webhook payloads for local n8n testing. These examples contain no secrets.

body.input_text: For Sierra Ridge, overnight guards must verify a physical photo ID for all after-hours visitors before granting access. If the visitor only has a photo of an ID, call the resident before entry and note the exception in the visitor log.

expected.reason: Access-control content should be review-routed to the inbox.

body.input_text: At Harbor Point on 2026-05-14 around 07:45, the east gate arm stayed open after a vendor truck exited. Patrol secured the gate manually and notified maintenance. Need follow-up to confirm the gate controller is repaired.

expected.reason: Gate access incident should be review-routed to the inbox.

body.input_text: Create an n8n workflow later that accepts a webhook from the operations form, classifies the note, writes a Markdown file to the vault, and commits it to GitHub.

expected.reason: Planning note can route to automations unless QA checker flags missing context.

body.input_text: Need to remember the thing from yesterday before the next shift.
